name: Brøderbund Software
description: American software and game company known for Prince of Persia, Karateka, Lode Runner, Myst, The Print Shop, and Where in the World Is Carmen Sandiego?

eras.title: Apple II and Educational Software Era
eras.description: Brøderbund becomes a major home computer publisher through Apple II games, creative tools, and educational software.

eras.title: Prince of Persia and Multimedia Era
eras.description: The company publishes Prince of Persia and major multimedia/edutainment software before being acquired by The Learning Company.
